4.3: Contact: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Building Society, Saffron House, 1A Market Street, Saffron Walden, Essex CB10 1HX
5.1.1: Applicants must have been registered owners for minimum 6 months.
Waivers considered for inherited property (post-probate), purchase/gift of building plot, or developer part exchange.
Contact for referral: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.
5.2.1: Applicants must have been registered owners for minimum 6 months.
Waivers considered for inherited property (post-probate), purchase/gift of building plot, or developer part exchange.
Contact for referral: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.
5.4.4: Reports not required unless specified in mortgage offer or valuer requests them.
Required if reports indicate adverse impact on security.
Refer reports to: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.
5.4.5: Personal searches accepted at conveyancer's risk.
Subscription to the Search Code (PCCB) is recommended.
5.4.6: Search insurance accepted for re-mortgages and purchases at conveyancer's risk.
Policy must protect lender and be certify-able as good and marketable title.
5.5.3a: If planning/building regulation breach is within enforcement period, report recommendations to Mortgage Processing Team.
5.5.3b: Original/copy of planning permission not required unless specified in mortgage offer.
Conveyancer must retain a copy; borrower to retain original.
5.5.3c: Building regulation consents not required unless specified in mortgage offer.
Conveyancer must retain a copy; borrower to retain original.
5.5.3d: Certificates of lawful use/development not required unless specified in mortgage offer.
Conveyancer must retain a copy; borrower to retain original.
5.5.4: Report restrictions on use/marketability to: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.
5.7.1a: Flying freeholds accepted if the flying element does not exceed 15% of the property.
Valuer must note the element in the valuation report.
Subject to requirements in Part 1 paragraph 5.7.2.
5.7.1b: Lending on freehold flats, maisonettes, or coach house flats is not permitted.
5.7.1c: No reporting required if flying freehold conditions in section 5.7 are satisfied.
5.8.1: Accepted for buildings with max 4 flats where borrower occupies one.
Borrower or another flat owner must own the freehold, with other flats on long leases.
5.8.5: Accepted for building with two leasehold flats where owners cross-hold freehold reversions.
Requires a charge over both freehold reversion and leasehold titles.
5.10.1: Report use restrictions to: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.
5.13.1: Report if balance is not from borrower funds or involves second charge to: Mortgage Processing Team.
5.14.15a: Report absentee/insolvent landlords to: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance accepted for absent/insolvent landlords.
Must comply with Part 1 Section 9 and benefit lender and transferees.
5.14.17a: Requirements apply for properties needing Building Safety Act 2022 remediation.
Exempt: Buildings < 11m, < 5 storeys, or where no fire safety/cladding issues exist.
EWS1 forms from A Kiziak or Tri-Fire are not accepted.
Lending prohibited if owner is non-qualifying leaseholder or if fire safety work costs are to be borne by leaseholders.
Landlord Certificate must be correctly executed.
Developer remediation requires written confirmation of full funding (letter or certified contract).
Report to lender before exchange if remediation/safety issues arise.
5.14.17b: Conveyancer must inform lender if valuer assumptions on remediation are incorrect.
Required documents for offer: Developer intention confirmation, or Government Leaseholder Deed of Certificate plus Landlord Certificate.
Conveyancer must ensure borrower understands financial contribution and remediation impact.
5.14.17c: Building safety requirements in 5.14.17a and 5.14.17b apply to remortgages.
5.14.1: Minimum unexpired lease term: 60 years remaining at the end of the mortgage term.
5.14.9: Refer if Ground Rent exceeds £250 (£400 in London).
New build cap: 0.1% of property value.
RPI reviews: Acceptable if review frequency is every 5 years or more.
Doubling rents: Acceptable if interval >= 20 years and doubling ceases after 125 years.
Fixed increases: Should not exceed double.
Property price linked escalations are prohibited.
Contact: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.
5.14.10: Refer if service charge increases > £1,000 p.a. or > 1% of property value p.a.
Report planned work costs, timescales, and applicant's contribution to Mortgage Processing Team.
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance for lease terms accepted subject to Part 1 Section 9.
5.14.12: Ground rent/service charge receipts not required; borrower to retain.
5.14.13: Receipted copy of notice required after completion.
Submit original or certified copy via LMS Conveyancer Zone.

5.15.2b: Management company share certificate not required; borrower to retain.
5.15.2c: Signed blank stock transfer form not required; borrower to retain.
5.15.2d: Memorandum and articles of association not required; borrower to retain.
5.16.2: Refer search entry issues to: Mortgage Processing Team, Saffron Walden address.

5.17.5b: Statutory declaration of non-revocation of POA not required.

5.20.4: Disclose existing Green Deal Plans if balance > £10,000.
